facebook.caption: Cà Phê Bàng is the kind of local coffee shop that earns its 4.5-star rating one cup at a time. Tucked along Đ. Trần Phú in Khu 7, this spot draws a loyal crowd of regulars and curious visitors who stumble in and never want to leave. Come for the Vietnamese coffee, stay for the unhurried, genuine atmosphere that chain cafes simply cannot replicate. Practical tip: mornings are the sweet spot, when the neighborhood is waking up and your iced cà phê sữa hits differently.
facebook.video_caption: Watch the condensation drip down a glass of iced Vietnamese coffee at Cà Phê Bàng. This is what a real local cafe looks and feels like on Đ. Trần Phú. No fuss, no filter, just great coffee and an easy Phu Quoc morning.

instagram.caption: Your Phu Quoc morning starts here. Cà Phê Bàng on Đ. Trần Phú is a 4.5-star local favorite that trades Instagram backdrops for genuine Vietnamese coffee culture. Pull up a chair and slow down.
instagram.video_caption: Iced coffee, street sounds, zero rush. Cà Phê Bàng is the local cafe fix your Phu Quoc trip needs. Find it on Đ. Trần Phú and thank yourself later.

tiktok.caption: This local cafe on Đ. Trần Phú is Phu Quoc in a cup. Cà Phê Bàng, 4.5 stars, no hype needed. #PhuQuoc #VietnamCoffee #CaPheBang #LocalCafe #TravelVietnam
